❌ Backend Error:

Show me all employees in IT earning more than 70k

❌ Backend Error:

500 Server Error: Internal Server Error for url: http://127.0.0.1:8000/query/
Can you give me employees who are in the IT department only

Based on the SQL results, I can tell you that the employees who are in the IT department only are:

* Amit Sharma, a Software Engineer
* Vikram Singh, a DevOps Engineer

These two employees are part of the IT department.
Show me all employees in IT earning more than 70k

Based on the provided SQL results, here is the answer to your query:

There are two employees in the IT department who earn more than 70,000 per year. They are:

1. Vikram Singh, a DevOps Engineer, who earns 80,000 per year.
2. Amit Sharma, a Software Engineer, who earns 75,000 per year.

Both of these employees are part of the IT department and have a salary above 70,000.
Show me all employees in IT earning less than 70k

Based on the SQL results, here is the answer to your query:

There are no employees in the IT department earning less than 70,000.
Show me all employees in IT earning less than 70k
Based on the SQL results, I can see that there are no employees in the IT department earning less than 70,000.
